title: Dynamic Fashion Pricing Engine
stack: XGBoost · Random Forest · Scikit-learn · FastAPI · Pandas
points: Built a machine learning system to predict optimal product prices using historical retail data.
Performed data cleaning, feature engineering and exploratory data analysis to improve model performance.
Trained and compared multiple regression models including Random Forest and XGBoost.
Deployed the trained model behind a FastAPI REST API for real-time price prediction.
Designed the project with a modular pipeline that supports future model retraining and deployment.
